## Description

<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR implements. -->

### Related Issue
<!-- Link to the related issue. Fixes #<issue_number> -->

### Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Core engine module
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Skill module
- [ ] Configuration

## Testing

<!-- Describe the testing performed. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests run
- [ ] End-to-end tests run
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] Performance impact assessed

### Test Environment
<!-- OS, version, configuration used for testing. -->

## Documentation

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Code is self-documenting (meaningful names, comments)
- [ ] API / module documentation updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] README.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated (if applicable)

## Security Considerations

<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials in code
- [ ] Input validation added (if applicable)
- [ ] Error handling does not leak sensitive data
- [ ] No new attack surface introduced
- [ ] Dependency security checked

## Screenshots / Videos
<!-- If UI changes, include screenshots or videos. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows coding standards (see CODING_STANDARDS.md)
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented in description)
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format
